source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    UniqueID
    ,EmployeeID
    ,CAST(NULLIF(StartDate, '') AS DATETIME) AS StartDate
    ,EmployeeName
    ,CAST(NULLIF(EndDate, '') AS DATETIME) AS EndDate
    ,Status
    ,LocationID
    ,NULLIF(StartDetails, '') AS StartDetails
    ,NULLIF(EndDetails, '') AS EndDetails
    ,CAST(NULLIF(EnteredOn, '') AS DATETIME) AS EnteredOn
    ,CAST(NULLIF(UpdatedOn, '') AS DATETIME) AS UpdatedOn
    ,EnteredBy
    ,UpdatedBy
    ,Export
    ,NULLIF(ShowAlert, '') AS ShowAlert
    ,NULLIF(Department, '') AS Department
    ,NULLIF(RosterID, '') AS RosterID
    ,NULLIF(Role, '') AS Role
    ,DaysTaken
    ,EnteredByID
    ,BatchId
    ,AbsenceCode
    ,AbsenceCategory
    ,BradfordFactorInclude
    ,Reviewed
    ,UpdatedByID
    ,UpdateType
    ,CAST(NULLIF(ExpectedEndDate, '') AS DATETIME) AS ExpectedEndDate
    ,ActivityID
    ,ActivityLocationID
    ,SentToUnit
    ,'FULL_tblCalender.txt'SourceFileName
FROM 
    CareBlox.STG_tblCalender

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    [HRRecordID]
    ,[EmployeeID]
    ,[HomeID]
    ,[HRChecklistID]
    ,[ItemGroupID]
    ,[ItemName]
    ,[ItemStatus]
    ,[ItemValue1]
    ,[ItemValue2]
    ,[ItemReference]
    ,[ItemNotes]
    ,DATEADD(s, ReviewDueDate, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS [ReviewDueDate]
    ,DATEADD(SECOND, ItemExpires / 1000000.0, CAST('1970-01-01 00:00:00' AS datetime2)) AS [ItemExpires]
    ,DATEADD(ss, RequestedDate, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS [RequestedDate]
    ,DATEADD(ss, ReceivedDate, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS [ReceivedDate]
    ,DATEADD(ss, CreatedDate, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS [CreatedDate]
    ,[CreatedByID]
    ,DATEADD(ss, [ClosedDate], '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS [ClosedDate]
    ,[ClosedByID]
    ,DATEADD(ss, LastUpdatedDate, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS [LastUpdatedDate]
    ,[LastUpdatedByID]
    ,[Deleted]
FROM 
    CareBlox.stgtblHR_Records

source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH BudgetData AS(
SELECT 
    H.IntranetID,
    S.BudgetType,
    S.ExchCode,
    S.GLCode,
    S.GLDesc,
    P.BudgetDate,
    S.YearEnd,
    TRY_CAST(P.Amount AS NUMERIC(18,5)) AS BudgetAmount
FROM 
    Exchequer.STG_Budgets AS S

    LEFT JOIN Avery.HomeDetails H
        ON H.ExchCode = S.ExchCode

    CROSS APPLY (VALUES
        (S.Period1Date, S.Period1Value),
        (S.Period2Date, S.Period2Value),
        (S.Period3Date, S.Period3Value),
        (S.Period4Date, S.Period4Value),
        (S.Period5Date, S.Period5Value),
        (S.Period6Date, S.Period6Value),
        (S.Period7Date, S.Period7Value),
        (S.Period8Date, S.Period8Value),
        (S.Period9Date, S.Period9Value),
        (S.Period10Date, S.Period10Value),
        (S.Period11Date, S.Period11Value),
        (S.Period12Date, S.Period12Value)
    ) AS P(BudgetDate, Amount)

WHERE 
    S.ExchCode IS NOT NULL
    AND P.BudgetDate IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT 
    CAST(
        CAST(BudgetData.IntranetID AS VARCHAR(4)) + 
        CAST(BudgetData.BudgetType AS VARCHAR(1)) +
        CAST(BudgetData.GLCode AS VARCHAR(6)) + 
        CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(BudgetData.BudgetDate AS DATE), 112) 
    AS BIGINT) AS BudgetCompositeKey,
    *
FROM
    BudgetData
ORDER BY
    IntranetID ASC,
    GLCode ASC,
    BudgetDate ASC,
    BudgetType ASC

source.name: Timesheeted Hours minus Posted Shift Hours

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    M.HomeID
    ,M.Homename
    ,A.[LocationName]
    ,[UnitName]
    ,[ShiftID]
    ,[ShiftWorkerType]
    ,CASE WHEN [ShiftStartWeek] LIKE '%/%' THEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [ShiftStartWeek], 103) ELSE [ShiftStartWeek] END AS [ShiftStartWeek]
    ,CASE WHEN [ShiftStartDate] LIKE '%/%' THEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [ShiftStartDate], 103) ELSE [ShiftStartDate] END AS [ShiftStartDate]
    ,TRY_CAST([ShiftStartTimeofDay] AS TIME) AS [ShiftStartTimeofDay]
    ,CASE WHEN [ShiftEndDate] LIKE '%/%' THEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [ShiftEndDate], 103) ELSE [ShiftEndDate] END AS [ShiftEndDate]
    ,TRY_CAST([ShiftEndTimeofDay] AS TIME) AS [ShiftEndTimeofDay]
    ,[ShiftTimePeriod]
    ,TRY_CAST(ShiftBreakLength AS NUMERIC(6,2)) AS ShiftBreakLength --NEW
    ,CASE WHEN BreaksPaid = 'Yes' THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS BreaksPaid --NEW
    ,CASE WHEN [OneToOne] = 'Yes' THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS [OneToOne]
    ,ShiftPostedBy  --NEW
    ,CASE WHEN ShiftPostedDate LIKE '%/%' THEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ShiftPostedDate, 103) ELSE ShiftPostedDate END AS ShiftPostedDate --NEW
    ,TRY_CAST(ShiftPostedTimeofDay AS TIME) AS ShiftPostedTimeofDay  --NEW
    ,CASE WHEN PreArrangedShift = 'Yes' THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS PreArrangedShift  --NEW
    ,[ShiftReason]
    ,[Status]
    ,NULLIF(WorkerName, '') AS WorkerName --NEW
    ,TRY_CAST(WorkerRating AS NUMERIC(6,2)) AS WorkerRating --NEW
    ,NULLIF(WorkedByName, '') AS WorkedByName --NEW
    ,NULLIF(WorkedByTradingAs, '') AS WorkedByTradingAs --NEW
    ,NULLIF([WorkedByTier], '') AS [WorkedByTier]
    ,TRY_CAST([ApprovedApplicationCost] AS NUMERIC(6,2)) AS [ApprovedApplicationCost]
    ,TRY_CAST([PostedShiftHours] AS NUMERIC(6,2)) AS [PostedShiftHours]
    ,CASE WHEN [ApprovedLowestCost] = 'Yes' THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS [ApprovedLowestCost]
    ,TRY_CAST(TotalLowerCostApplications AS NUMERIC(6,2)) AS TotalLowerCostApplications --NEW
    ,TRY_CAST(TotalApplicationsReceived AS INT) AS TotalApplicationsReceived --NEW
    ,[TimesheetID]
    ,TimesheetStatus --NEW
    ,CASE WHEN TimesheetSubmittedDate LIKE '%/%' THEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, NULLIF(TimesheetSubmittedDate, ''), 103) ELSE TimesheetSubmittedDate END AS TimesheetSubmittedDate --NEW
    ,TimesheetSubmittedTime --NEW
    ,NULLIF(TimesheetApprovedBy, '') AS TimesheetApprovedBy --NEW
    ,CASE WHEN TimesheetApprovedDate LIKE '%/%' THEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, NULLIF(TimesheetApprovedDate, ''), 103) ELSE TimesheetApprovedDate END AS TimesheetApprovedDate --NEW
    ,TRY_CAST(TimesheetApprovedTime AS TIME) AS TimesheetApprovedTime --NEW
    ,TRY_CAST([TimesheetedHours] AS NUMERIC(6,2)) AS TimesheetedHours --NEW
    ,TRY_CAST([TimesheetedHoursminusPostedShiftHours] AS NUMERIC(6,2)) AS TimesheetedHoursminusPostedShiftHours
    ,CASE WHEN [Invoiced] = 'Yes' THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS [Invoiced]
    ,InvoiceID --NEW
    ,CASE WHEN InvoiceDate LIKE '%/%' THEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, InvoiceDate, 103) ELSE InvoiceDate END AS InvoiceDate--NEW
    ,TRY_CAST(CostSubtotal AS NUMERIC(6,2)) AS CostSubtotal --NEW
    ,TRY_CAST(CostVAT AS NUMERIC(6,2)) AS CostVAT --NEW
    ,TRY_CAST(TotalCost AS NUMERIC(6,2)) AS TotalCost --NEW
    ,[ReleasedBy]
    ,CASE WHEN ReleasedDate LIKE '%/%' THEN TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ReleasedDate, 103) ELSE ReleasedDate END AS  ReleasedDate--NEW
    ,TRY_CAST(ReleasedTime AS TIME) AS ReleasedTime --NEW
    ,TRY_CAST([TotalCostIncludingExpenses] AS NUMERIC(6,2)) AS [TotalCostIncludingExpenses]
    ,A.[RowID]
FROM 
    [Florence].[STG_Accural] AS A

    LEFT JOIN Florence.LocationMapping AS M
        ON M.LocationName = A.LocationName
WHERE
    A.ShiftID IS NOT NULL

activities.name: Copy 90 Days Occupancy Data
activities.description: Copies data from Polestar DB Occupancy table to TRANSFOR_DB OCCUPANCY_INCR table. Only the last 90 days of records

sqlReaderQuery.value: Select * from dbo.Occupancy where CAST(CreateDateTime as date)>= '@{variables('DeleteDate')}'

activities.name: Add new records to Occupancy Table

text.value:
Delete from Transform_DB.STG.OCCUPANCY
WHERE CreateDateTime>= '@{variables('DeleteDate')}'

Insert into Transform_DB.STG.OCCUPANCY 
Select * from Transform_DB.STG.OCCUPANCY_INCR
